insights.headline: Which content mixes land in the top referral tier before you publish?
insights.lede: About 25% of posts sit in the top referral quartile by donation_referrals. Holdout ROC-AUC is 0.982 (baseline 0.5); 5-fold CV AUC ≈ 0.975.

prediction_cards.label: ROC-AUC — top referral quartile
prediction_cards.definition: Discrimination for predicting whether a post lands in the top quartile of donation_referrals.

prediction_cards.label: R² on log donation value
prediction_cards.definition: How much variance in log-linked donation value the explanatory model explains on holdout posts.

prediction_cards.label: Share of posts in top referral quartile
prediction_cards.definition: Baseline share of posts in the top referral quartile in this export.

prediction_cards.label: Strongest driver in permutation test
prediction_cards.definition: Feature with highest permutation importance in this run—inspect drivers table for detail.

cause_cards.title: Content mix links to referrals and value
cause_cards.body: Coefficients and importances describe patterns in historical posts—not guarantees for the next post.
cause_cards.definition: Summaries are historical associations; they do not guarantee the next post will perform the same.

cause_cards.title: Plan before publish
cause_cards.body: Use predicted top-quartile probability to prioritize review of mixes that look like past high-referral posts.
cause_cards.definition: Suggested workflow: prioritize editorial review for posts with high predicted top-quartile probability.
